message:
The other night, I was whipping up dinner while my phone was charging in the kitchen. You know how it goes—streaming a show, chopping veggies, and just enjoying the evening. Then, out of nowhere, the smoke alarm goes off! It wasn't a full-on fire, thankfully, just a little smoke from the pan. But let me tell you, my phone decided that was the perfect moment to die. No notifications, no timers, just silence! 

After I fanned the smoke away and checked everything was okay, I realized how vital it is to have a plan. Not just for cooking, but for emergencies. My husband and I recently sat down to make a fire escape plan together, and it felt like a breath of fresh air to have that covered. 

If your phone goes kaput at the wrong time, knowing what to do can make all the difference. Have you ever had a tech fail when you needed it most? What’s your go-to plan in those moments?
